verses.text: As Christ suffered, arm yourselves with the same mind, to live 'not... to the lusts of men, but to the will of God.' New mind. Suffering with Christ breaks sin's hold.
As Christ suffered, arm yourselves with the same mind, to live 'not... to the lusts of men, but to the will of God.' New mind. Suffering with Christ breaks sin's hold.
As Christ suffered, arm yourselves with the same mind, to live 'not... to the lusts of men, but to the will of God.' New mind. Suffering with Christ breaks sin's hold.
They think it strange you run not with them to riot; but they shall 'give account to him that is ready to judge the quick and the dead.' Coming reckoning. The mockers face the Judge.
They think it strange you run not with them to riot; but they shall 'give account to him that is ready to judge the quick and the dead.' Coming reckoning. The mockers face the Judge.
They think it strange you run not with them to riot; but they shall 'give account to him that is ready to judge the quick and the dead.' Coming reckoning. The mockers face the Judge.

'The end of all things is at hand'; be sober, watch in prayer, and 'above all... have fervent charity,' for 'charity shall cover... sins.' Watchful love. Nearness of the end calls for prayer and love.

'The end of all things is at hand'; be sober, watch in prayer, and 'above all... have fervent charity,' for 'charity shall cover... sins.' Watchful love. Nearness of the end calls for prayer and love.
Use hospitality without grudging; as good stewards minister your gifts, 'that God in all things may be glorified.' Serve well. Every gift is given to glorify God.
Use hospitality without grudging; as good stewards minister your gifts, 'that God in all things may be glorified.' Serve well. Every gift is given to glorify God.
Use hospitality without grudging; as good stewards minister your gifts, 'that God in all things may be glorified.' Serve well. Every gift is given to glorify God.
Think it not strange concerning 'the fiery trial'; rejoice as partakers of Christ's sufferings; 'happy are ye' if reproached for His name. Shared suffering. To suffer for Christ is cause for joy.
Think it not strange concerning 'the fiery trial'; rejoice as partakers of Christ's sufferings; 'happy are ye' if reproached for His name. Shared suffering. To suffer for Christ is cause for joy.
Think it not strange concerning 'the fiery trial'; rejoice as partakers of Christ's sufferings; 'happy are ye' if reproached for His name. Shared suffering. To suffer for Christ is cause for joy.
Let none suffer as an evildoer; but 'if any man suffer as a Christian, let him not be ashamed,' but glorify God. No shame. Suffering for the Name is an honour.
Let none suffer as an evildoer; but 'if any man suffer as a Christian, let him not be ashamed,' but glorify God. No shame. Suffering for the Name is an honour.
Judgment 'must begin at the house of God'; let sufferers 'commit the keeping of their souls to him... as unto a faithful Creator.' Commit your soul. Trust the faithful God amid trial.
